name: Self-hosted homelab on K3s
description: Four-node K3s cluster on commodity hardware sitting at home. Hands-on with the full delivery path — packaging, deployment, networking, observability — for the services I actually use, including this site and the notebook below.

name: Technical knowledge base (mdBook)
description: An mdBook-based reference of in-depth technical guides — data structures, algorithms, system design, and infrastructure setup notes. Self-hosted on the homelab cluster.

name: Sonatype Maven Central Publisher (Gradle plugin)
description: Open-source Gradle plugin I authored and maintain on the official Plugin Portal. Publishes JVM artefacts to Maven Central through Sonatype's Central Portal API. Demo projects: github.com/ani2fun/plugin-demo.

name: Portfolio site (this one)
description: React + Next.js portfolio, packaged as a container and deployed to the homelab cluster behind the same ingress as the rest of my services.

name: Food Ordering System (DDD + Hexagonal)
description: An e-commerce prototype for a food-ordering system, written to practise hexagonal architecture and domain-driven design end-to-end — Kotlin services on Spring Boot, Kafka for events, PostgreSQL for storage, Next.js frontend.
